meaning: n.[植] 十字花科的一年生植物,香雪球
examples: Warm citrus notes combine with hints of peppermint, alyssum and frangipani to create a wonderfully exhilarant scent.
ALYSSUM international is an international purchaser from Pakistan, need to buy products of Furniture, Hardware etc. categories.
Any of various chiefly Mediterranean weeds or ornamentals of the genus Alyssum in the mustard family, having racemes of white or yellow flowers.
